title: isPrime
goal: Create src/prime.mjs exporting function isPrime(n): true when integer n >= 2 is prime, false otherwise (including 0, 1, negatives, and non-integers).
notes: Golden must stress: 2 (true), 1 and 0 (false), a negative (false), a non-integer like 2.5 (false), a larger prime (e.g. 97). Visible can test just 7 and 8.
